facts.claim: Carnival Freedom offers some of the latest and greatest features across our fleet. Explore the cruise ship and you'll find a wide range of fun options to make the most of your time at sea. See photos, onboard activities, staterooms, deck plans, and itineraries. Book your Carnival Freedom cruise today!
Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Freedom is a Conquest-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.
She was delivered to Carnival on 28 February 2007.
